name: Avatar Voiceover-over-B-roll Reel
description: Fullscreen Instagram/Reels format: a talking-head avatar HOOK, then fullscreen screen-capture b-roll clips (one per beat) while the avatar VOICEOVER keeps playing, then an optional fullscreen avatar CLOSE. Letterboxed/landscape avatar renders are blurred-filled to fill 9:16. Lower-third karaoke captions, a top badge that can swap (topic to CTA), and a typing bed + click-on-cut. Mirrors the 'film my laptop screen with my phone, talk over it' reel style.
best_for: 9:16 reels where the talking head only appears for the hook (and close) and b-roll carries the middle
remixing a library of screen-capture clips under one avatar voiceover
comment-gated or share-gated lead-magnet reels in the creator's own style
reproducing an existing reel beat-for-beat from its transcript + matching b-roll
not_for: fictional UGC creator paid ads (use ugc-ai-ad)
news/tutorial masters with PiP + source receipts (use avatar-explainer)

stages.title: Intake + script
actions: Collect the avatar id + voice (HEYGEN_AVATAR_ID / HEYGEN_VOICE_ID or ElevenLabs for non-English), the b-roll clip library, and the script.
Shape the script: hook, then one mechanism beat per b-roll surface, then a comment- or share-gated CTA. Avatars speak slower; a 33s human script lands near 40s.

stages.title: Generate avatar clip (continuous VO)
actions: Reuse avatar-insta-split/gen_avatar.py to render the 9:16 avatar; its audio is the continuous voiceover for the whole reel.
The avatar video is only shown for the hook (and close); during b-roll beats only its audio plays.

stages.title: Transcribe + map b-roll to beats
actions: Transcribe the avatar audio (Groq Whisper, word timestamps).
Split into beats on phrase breaks; mark the hook (and close) as type 'avatar' and each middle beat as type 'broll' with the matching library clip.

stages.title: Build fullscreen reel + captions + SFX
actions: It blurred-fills the avatar to fullscreen for the hook/close, cuts each b-roll clip fullscreen on its beat, lays lower-third karaoke captions, overlays the badge sequence, and mixes the continuous VO + typing bed + click-on-cut with loudnorm.

stages.title: QC + export
actions: Sample a frame per beat: avatar fills the frame on the hook/close, b-roll fills the frame on each beat, captions in the lower third, badge swaps on cue.
Check loudness (~-16 LUFS), no clipping, no black frames, VO lip-sync continuous across cuts.

routing_keywords: film my screen with my phone reel
script_shape: Mechanism beats (each beat = one fullscreen b-roll surface, VO continues)
CTA (comment- or share-gated; optional talking-head close)
qc_checks: avatar fills the frame on the hook/close (blurred-fill, no raw letterbox bars)
each b-roll beat fills the frame and is the right clip for the line
captions sit in the lower third and track the VO words
badge sequence swaps on cue (topic to CTA)
typing bed low under the first ~2s; a click lands on each cut
loudness ~-16 LUFS, true peak <= -1.5 dBTP, no clipping, no black frames
compliance_notes: Only use an avatar of a real person with their permission or a licensed/own likeness.
Disclose AI presenters where the platform requires it.
